globalNews.title: Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island
globalNews.summary: A 69-year-old woman who later died in South Africa is among those who left MV Hondius at St Helena.

globalNews.title: Three women linked to Islamic State arrested in Australia on return from Syria
globalNews.summary: Three women who allegedly supported IS were arrested after they flew home to Australia for the first time in years.

globalNews.title: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
globalNews.summary: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.

globalNews.title: US judge releases Jeffrey Epstein's purported suicide note
globalNews.summary: Epstein's former cellmate claims he found the note, which has not been verified by the BBC.

globalNews.title: Iran considering US proposal as Trump says war will be 'over quickly'
globalNews.summary: Mediator Pakistan says it is "endeavouring to convert this ceasefire into a permanent end to this war".

cryptoNews.title: Kraken parent Payward to buy Reap in $600M stablecoin payments push
cryptoNews.summary: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong-based Reap for up to $600 million, adding card issuance and stablecoin payment capabilities to its new B2B platform.

cryptoNews.title: Polygon reduces block time to 1.75 seconds as payments push accelerates
cryptoNews.summary: Polygon delivered its first block time reduction upgrade since genesis, as the network seeks to position for more high-frequency applications such as private stablecoin payments.

cryptoNews.title: XRP 'probably going to $12' as price holds historical bottom zone for months
cryptoNews.summary: XRP is retesting a key multi-year support zone that has historically preceded major rebounds, with analysts predicting a rally toward $12 if the level holds.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea confirms 22% crypto tax starting January 2027: Report
cryptoNews.summary: South Korea’s Finance Ministry has reportedly confirmed for the first time that a 22% tax on crypto gains will proceed as scheduled in January 2027.

cryptoNews.title: Core Scientific posts $347M loss as AI hosting overtakes Bitcoin mining
cryptoNews.summary: Core Scientific mined 279 BTC in the quarter, down 45% from a year earlier, while its colocation business became its top revenue source.

aiNews.summary: If startup visibility, traction, and real deals matter, you should be on the TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 exhibit floor. Get your 6' exhibit table before your competitor does.

aiNews.title: Aurora’s Chris Urmson on why self-driving trucks are finally ready to scale

aiNews.summary: Two days left to save up to $410 on your pass, and get a second one at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Offer ends May 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.

aiNews.title: China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets
aiNews.summary: Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.
